title: Weapons of DMC
description: Adds dmc weapons for Weapons of Miracales.Changes The Weapons models and textures and some particles with DMC Weapons And Models And Texture And particles.
body:
New 2.0 wom update.Adds better item moels from "Devil Never Craft" pack. Make sure to check it out:https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devil-never-craft.
Credits:K.Overlegen(Icon took from his video.Chanel:[https://www.youtube.com/@k.overlegen](https://www.youtube.com/@k.overlegen)),
        VoidyJam(His model helped me a lot to match my own model.Chanel:[https://www.youtube.com/@voidyjam](https://www.youtube.com/@voidyjam))
        Judgement cut particles are taken from BD&Hill Reforge the Sword Edge:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bd-hill-reforge-the-sword-edge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bd-hill-reforge-the-sword-edge)
        Big thanks to all
        Note:Development may be longer because I'm new in creating mopdels and textures so please be patient for future updates.
        Here's a clip:
        [https://imgur.com/a4UKuHY](https://imgur.com/a4UKuHY)
        All weapons are added.
        I will try to make them better if I can.
        Join my discord server now!
        https://discord.com/invite/nxMAaD4Hmc
